resolve_addr() {
    local addr=$1
    # Find the last symbol whose address is <= our target address
    local result=$(awk -v target="$addr" '
        BEGIN { best_name="??"; best_addr=0 }
        {
            a = strtonum("0x" $1)
            t = strtonum("0x" target)
            if (a <= t) { best_name = $3; best_addr = a }
        }
        END { printf "%s+0x%x", best_name, strtonum("0x" target) - best_addr }
    ' /tmp/mono_syms.txt)
    echo "$result"
}
